tools.name: create_campaign
tools.description: Create ONE Meta campaign (created PAUSED for review). Free-plan friendly — counts toward your monthly campaign limit. To launch many at once or from a Drive folder, use bulk_create_campaigns (Pro). Needs a public imageUrl (or Drive/Dropbox share link) for image ads. WRITES live.

tools.name: create_structured
tools.description: Create ONE campaign with MULTIPLE ad sets and MULTIPLE ads each (1 campaign -> N ad sets -> M ads), image or video, including DPA/Catalog dynamic product ads. Created PAUSED. Honors spend guardrails. Pro feature. WRITES live.

tools.name: get_ad_accounts
tools.description: List the Meta ad accounts connected to this Adbloop user, with the Page NAME + Instagram username + pixel each account uses. Use this to resolve a spoken account/page name to IDs.

tools.name: list_drive_folder
tools.description: List the images/videos inside a PUBLIC Google Drive folder (must be shared as 'Anyone with the link'). Returns each file's name and a Drive URL usable directly as imageUrl in bulk_create_campaigns. Perfect for 'create one campaign per image in this folder'. Read-only.

tools.name: get_insights
tools.description: Rate-limit-safe Meta performance metrics (spend, impressions, clicks, CTR, leads, purchases, ROAS). Read-only.

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.description: List existing campaigns with status, budget, effective status. Read-only.

tools.name: list_adsets
tools.description: List ad sets — across the account or inside one campaign. Shows budget, optimization goal, status. Read-only.

tools.name: list_ads
tools.description: List ads — across the account or inside one ad set. Includes creative preview info. Read-only.

tools.name: get_campaign_structure
tools.description: Full tree of one campaign: its ad sets and every ad inside each. Read-only.

tools.name: add_ad_to_adset
tools.description: Add a NEW ad (with creative) to an EXISTING ad set. Created PAUSED. Accepts either an existing creative_id, a library image_hash (this is where saved library creatives CAN be used), or ad copy fields. WRITES live.

tools.name: pause_campaigns
tools.description: Pause campaigns/ad sets/ads by ID. Reversible.

tools.name: resume_campaigns
tools.description: Resume (activate) paused campaigns/ad sets/ads by ID. Turns spend ON.

tools.name: delete_campaigns
tools.description: PERMANENTLY delete campaigns/ad sets/ads by ID. Irreversible — requires confirm:true. Use pause instead if unsure.

tools.name: update_campaign_budget
tools.description: Change the daily budget (and/or rename) of an existing campaign or ad set. The account is required so the new budget is checked against your spend guardrails. WRITES live.

tools.name: search_targeting
tools.description: Search Meta's targeting interests by keyword (e.g. 'yoga', 'small business owners'). Returns interest names, IDs, and audience sizes — useful when planning campaigns. Read-only.

tools.name: get_lead_forms
tools.description: List the lead-gen forms available on a Facebook Page (for OUTCOME_LEADS campaigns). Read-only.

tools.name: get_creative_library
tools.description: List the user's saved creatives. NOTE: image_hash works with add_ad_to_adset, but bulk_create_campaigns needs a public imageUrl (or Drive/Dropbox link). Read-only.

tools.name: estimate_bulk_create
tools.description: Estimate how long bulk creation will take for N campaigns. Read-only.

tools.name: get_guardrails
tools.description: View the spend safety limits for an account. Read-only. Editable only by the owner in Adbloop settings.

tools.name: check_capacity
tools.description: Check an ad account's current Meta API rate-limit headroom BEFORE a bulk run. Read-only. Returns GO/TIGHT/SPLIT/WAIT_OR_SPLIT/WAIT + utilization + regain minutes.

tools.name: validate_campaigns
tools.description: Pre-flight check campaign rows BEFORE creating. Read-only. Per-row verdict: will_create / will_create_with_changes / will_fail. Pass meta_account_id to also check spend guardrails.

tools.name: bulk_create_campaigns
tools.description: Create many Meta campaigns at once on ONE account (rate-limit-safe, validated). WRITES live. Honors plan limits, spend guardrails, and capacity. Auto-uses the correct Page/Instagram/pixel. Each campaign needs an imageUrl (public image, or Drive/Dropbox share link).

tools.name: bulk_create_multi_account
tools.description: Launch the SAME campaign set across MULTIPLE ad accounts in one call (up to 5 accounts; chain calls for more). Each account gets its own currency-aware guardrails, capacity check (throttled accounts are skipped, not hammered), and correct Page/Instagram/pixel. WRITES live.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_drive_folder · Private data: list_drive_folder · Public sink: create_campaign, bulk_create_campaigns · Destructive: delete_campaigns, check_capacity.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_drive_folder · Private data: list_drive_folder · Public sink: create_campaign, bulk_create_campaigns · Destructive: delete_campaigns, check_capacity

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
